name: rule options: /doctor --explain <rule-id> shows the resolved options for that rule (defaults from schema + profile values merged)
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: "https://g.com"
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
  content_hash: "sha256:S"
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
    name: x
    description: x
    detector: x
    type: problem
    fixable: null
    has_suggestions: false
    deprecated: false
    replaced_by: []
    docs_url: "https://x.com"
    requires_type_checking: false
    recommended: true
    options_schema:
      type: object
      properties:
        max:
          type: integer
          default: 10
    messages:
      default: x
    severity: P1
    version: 1.0.0
    semver: 1.0.0
    rule_state: warn-only
    provenance:
      - source: x
        class: published-standard
        section_id: x
        url: "https://x.com"
        fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
        content_hash: "sha256:S"
recommended_set: [g-x-001]
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > tree/google/x.yaml && printf 'rules:
  g-x-001: ["error", {max: 5}]
' > profile.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-x-001 --tree "$PWD/tree" --profile "$PWD/profile.yaml" 2>out.txt && grep -E 'resolved_options=.*"max":5' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
